sentences.target: Je réunis les documents pour le dossier.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁe.y.ni le dɔ.ky.mɑ̃ puʁ lə dɔ.sje/

translations.fr: Je réunis les documents pour le dossier.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁe.y.ni le dɔ.ky.mɑ̃ puʁ lə dɔ.sje/
translations.en: I'm gathering the documents for the file.
translations.es: Estoy juntando los documentos para la carpeta.
translations.de: Ich sammle die Unterlagen für den Ordner.
translations.it: Sto raccogliendo i documenti per il fascicolo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在为这个文件夹整理文件。
translations.yue: 我而家為個文件夾整理啲文件。
translations.pt: Estou reunindo os documentos para a pasta.
translations.vi: Tôi đang thu thập tài liệu cho hồ sơ.
translations.nl: Ik verzamel de documenten voor de map.
translations.hi: मैं फ़ाइल के लिए दस्तावेज़ इकट्ठा कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Μαζεύω τα έγγραφα για τον φάκελο.
translations.id: Saya sedang mengumpulkan dokumen untuk berkas.
translations.sv: Jag samlar ihop dokumenten till mappen.
translations.ja: ファイル用に書類を集めています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; syntactic subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive 'to gather/bring together', agreeing with 'Je'.
Definite article, plural; introduces the direct object noun phrase.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'réunis'.
Preposition marking purpose; heads the prepositional complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determinates 'dossier' as the object of 'pour'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'pour' (purpose).

sentences.target: Tu réunis tout le monde au salon.
sentences.reading: /ty ʁe.y.ni tu lə mɔ̃d o sa.lɔ̃/

translations.fr: Tu réunis tout le monde au salon.
translations.ipa: /ty ʁe.y.ni tu lə mɔ̃d o sa.lɔ̃/
translations.en: You gather everyone in the living room.
translations.es: Reúnes a todos en la sala.
translations.zh-Hans: 你把大家都召集到客厅。
translations.yue: 你喺客廳度召集晒大家。
translations.pt: Você reúne todo mundo na sala.
translations.vi: Bạn tập hợp mọi người trong phòng khách.
translations.ar: أنت تجمع الجميع في غرفة الجلوس.
translations.nl: Je verzamelt iedereen in de woonkamer.
translations.hi: तुम सबको लिविंग रूम में इकट्ठा कर रहे हो.
translations.id: Kamu mengumpulkan semua orang di ruang tamu.
translations.ro: Îi aduni pe toți în sufragerie.
translations.ja: あなたはみんなをリビングに集めतेいる。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; syntactic subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive.
Determiner quantifying 'le monde'; part of the fixed expression 'tout le monde' meaning 'everybody'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determinates 'monde' within the expression.
Common noun, masculine singular; in 'tout le monde' functions as a collective direct object ('everybody').
Preposition (orthographic contraction of 'à' + 'le'); heads a locative PP specifying place ('au salon').
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au' (location).

sentences.target: Elle réunit les voisins pour un apéro.
sentences.reading: /ɛl ʁe.y.ni le vwazɛ̃ puʁ œ̃ a.pe.ʁo/

translations.fr: Elle réunit les voisins pour un apéro.
translations.ipa: /ɛl ʁe.y.ni le vwazɛ̃ puʁ œ̃ a.pe.ʁo/
translations.en: She gathers the neighbors for drinks.
translations.es: Ella reúne a los vecinos para tomar algo.
translations.de: Sie versammelt die Nachbarn zum Aperitif.
translations.it: Lei riunisce i vicini per un aperitivo.
translations.ko: 그녀는 이웃들을 모아 같이 술을 마셔요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她把邻居们聚在一起小酌。
translations.pt: Ela reúne os vizinhos para um aperitivo.
translations.he: היא אוספת את השכנים לשתות משהו.
translations.tr: Komşuları birlikte bir şeyler içmek için bir araya getiriyor.
translations.vi: Cô ấy tập hợp hàng xóm để uống vài ly.
translations.nl: Ze verzamelt de buren voor een drankje.
translations.hi: वह पड़ोसियों को साथ में कुछ पीने के लिए जुटाती है.
translations.el: Μαζεύει τους γείτονες για ένα ποτό.
translations.nb: Hun samler naboene til en drink.
translations.id: Dia mengumpulkan para tetangga untuk minum bersama.
translations.sv: Hon samlar grannarna för att ta en drink.
translations.ro: Ea îi adună pe vecini pentru un pahar.
translations.da: Hun samler naboerne til en drink.
translations.ja: 彼女は近所の人たちを飲みに集めている。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person singular (feminine); syntactic subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive.
Definite article, plural; introduces the direct object noun phrase.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'réunit'.
Preposition marking purpose; introduces the PP expressing the occasion.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determinates 'apéro'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of 'pour' indicating the occasion.

sentences.target: On doit réunir les photos de vacances.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ dwa ʁe.y.niʁ le fɔ.to də va.kɑ̃s/

translations.fr: On doit réunir les photos de vacances.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ dwa ʁe.y.niʁ le fɔ.to də va.kɑ̃s/
translations.en: We need to gather the vacation photos.
translations.es: Tenemos que juntar las fotos de las vacaciones.
translations.it: Dobbiamo raccogliere le foto delle vacanze.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们得把假期照片收集起来。
translations.yue: 我哋要將啲旅行相集齊。
translations.ru: Нам нужно собрать фотографии из отпуска.
translations.pt: Precisamos reunir as fotos das férias.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים לאסוף את תמונות החופשה.
translations.vi: Chúng ta cần gom ảnh kỳ nghỉ lại.
translations.uk: Нам потрібно зібрати фотографії з відпустки.
translations.hu: Össze kell gyűjtenünk a nyaralás фотóit.
translations.hi: हमें छुट्टियों की तस्वीरें इकट्ठा करनी हैं.
translations.el: Πρέπει να μαζέψουμε τις φωτογραφίες των διακοπών.
translations.ro: Trebuie să adunăm fotografiile din vacanță.
translations.ja: 休暇の写真を集める必要があります。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun, morphologically 3rd person singular; syntactic subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; modal meaning obligation; takes an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; complement (xcomp) of 'doit', expressing the action to be carried out.
Definite article, plural; introduces the direct object noun phrase.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'réunir'.
Preposition introducing a nominal complement; links 'photos' to their theme/context.
Plural-only common noun; object of the preposition 'de' specifying the type of photos.
